title: Agent runtime context and prompts
goal: Teach the AI runtime/tool routing to use current page context safely.
requirements: Pass context_snapshot_id, window_id, context_version and context_hint to AgentRuntimeClient.chat and chat_stream.
Make ui.get_current_context read the bound context_snapshot_id for the current message/request.
Respect context_tool_enabled from the effective ai.chat_settings surface settings.
Keep backward compatibility if runtime ignores the new field.
Update prompts so context-dependent questions call ui.get_current_context.
Update prompts so 'эта заявка' maps to current workorder selection after context resolution.
Trace module, object_type, context_version, context_tool_called and hashed object id.
acceptance: Current workorder context leads to ui.get_current_context and then workorders.get/search for read questions.
If the user changes cards after submit, the current request still uses the originally bound snapshot.
Current workorder context pre-fills write tools but does not bypass confirmation.
Context-independent questions do not need to call ui.get_current_context.
When context_tool_enabled is false for the current surface, the runtime degrades without calling ui.get_current_context.
No context path behaves like existing chat.
